register.title: HK Residential Market Decline
register.description: Pok Fu Lam luxury sector has declined 9–14% from 2021 peak; further softness could push value below acquisition price.

register.title: Stale Valuation — Overstatement Risk
register.description: Last formal valuation October 2023; estimated 2–5% market decline since then may mean portfolio value is overstated.

register.title: Lease Expiry (2048) — Long-term Risk
register.description: 22-year residual lease adequate for medium-term; approaching 2040s, financing and exit options will reduce meaningfully.

register.title: Partial-let Management Complexity
register.description: Managing short-term lettings through CBRE agent introduces coordination complexity and higher letting fee exposure vs. long-term tenancy.

register.title: HKD Peg — Minimal FX Risk
register.description: HKD pegged to USD at 7.78; no material FX risk for USD-reporting trust.

scenarios.name: Commission Full-Valuation — Value Lower than Portfolio
scenarios.verdict: Unencumbered — no covenant impact. Unrealised capital loss of $127K. Recommend commissioning valuation to confirm.

scenarios.name: Fully Let at Market — Improved NOI
scenarios.verdict: Switching to full-year tenancy at HKD 22,000/mo would roughly double NOI to ~$34K/yr; requires family to use other residences.

mitigationPlan.action: Commission Colliers / Savills desktop valuation — budget HKD 12,000–15,000; required for U.S. listing disclosure package
